name: wanikani-mcp
description: Read WaniKani SRS data: user profile, lesson/review summaries, assignments, subjects, review statistics, and level progressions.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's WaniKani profile

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Get available lessons and reviews grouped by hour

tools.name: get_assignments
tools.description: Get SRS assignments with optional filters

tools.name: get_subjects
tools.description: Get radicals, kanji, and vocabulary with meanings and readings

tools.name: get_review_statistics
tools.description: Get review accuracy statistics per subject

tools.name: get_level_progressions
tools.description: Get progression history through WaniKani levels
